stemHtml: Within the European Region, an aircraft experiencing radio communication failure on an IFR departure in IMC has to squawk 7600 and..

options.a: maintain the level last assigned by ATC for a period of 5 minutes and then continue in accordance with the flight plan.
options.b: maintain the level last assigned by ATC for a period of 20 minutes and then climb in accordance with the flight plan.
options.c: climb immediately to the cruising level indicated in the flight plan.
